expectations.text: KB markdown file was created/updated under a kb/ directory
expectations.evidence: File created at /tmp/kb-eval-2-without/ but not under a kb/ subfolder — no canonical storage convention followed

expectations.text: File contains a ## section heading relevant to connection pools or 503 errors
expectations.evidence: Used # heading (H1 not H2): 'API 503 Errors — Connection Pool Misconfiguration' — relevant but wrong heading level for a KB section

expectations.text: Content captures the key facts: pool_size, value 100, pool_timeout, value 30
expectations.evidence: Table shows pool_size 5→100, pool_timeout set to 30s — facts are present

expectations.text: Agent confirmed what was saved and the file path
expectations.evidence: result.md includes file path and summary of approach

expectations.text: No unsubstituted template placeholders (e.g. {{topic}}) left in the output file
expectations.evidence: No template used — agent wrote content directly, no placeholders
